text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back from my outing with Gold City...
Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Booom!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wha... What was that explosion?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Five more sets!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami?! Are you okay? I just heard a loud
noise...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yes, that was the sound of me doing yoga!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Yoga?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I heard yoga makes you more beautiful!
Sooo...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Menko pose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk! Flap, flap, flap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Kawakami Princess slams a menko card onto
the ground, all the birds in the area take off at
once!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What am I watching...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Yoga really makes you work up a sweat.
Care to join, City?
choice_data_list: I wouldn't necessarily call that... yoga.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Shush! Trainer, look down by her feet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the feet of Kawakami Princess lies an open
notebook.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That's a lot of freaking notes. She must've put a ton of
"research" into coming up with that pose.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Telling her it's not yoga might crush her motivation.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Telling her it's not yoga might crush her motivation.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. I just never heard of the menko pose
before.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You must have studied a lot. Can you teach me
too?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Of course I can!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Mhm, mhm. So, that's the pigeon pose...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I see, then let's combine it with my rice-washing
pose to make a new one!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. But if pigeons washed rice, wouldn't their
wings get all soaked?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that sounds so sad. Okay, I'll just have to
learn the pigeon pose as it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City succeeds in teaching Kawakami
Princess the correct knowledge while maintaining
the guise of being her student.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Phew... I guess that worked out.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for keeping quiet and watching us,
Trainer. I knew you'd understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold City smiles in relief.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I-it isn't?! Huh? Oh, how embarrassing!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But don't feel discouraged. The work you were
doing is still valuable.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right! I'm glad you were here to point
out my mistakes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whoa, she bounced back quick.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...And so, I began to learn how to do true yoga
from City.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes east, sometimes west, through
unbeaten paths we dashed...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: W-wait, what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would make me feel like I've learned
something if I added some narration.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Sigh... We're not in some cartoon, you know.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Anyway, if it's okay with you, City, could
you teach me yoga?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure. I'm not an expert, but I can show you the
right poses.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh! Thank you! I'll do my best to keep up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City proceeds to teach Kawakami Princess
proper yoga.
